name: Coconut Pecan Biscotti
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Plus 2 tbsp Sweetened shredded coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Using an electric mixer, cream butter and sugar in a large bowl until well blended.
2. Add eggs one at a time, beating thoroughly after each addition.
3. Beat in the coconut.
4. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt separately in a medium bowl.
5. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the butter mixture.
6. Mix in the pecans. Cover and refrigerate dough for 30 minutes.
7. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.
9. Turn the dough out onto a floured work surface.
10. Divide the dough in half.
11. Shape each half into a log that is 2 inches wide.
12. Transfer logs to the prepared cookie sheet, spacing them evenly.
13. Bake until the logs are golden brown and firm to touch, and a tester inserted into the center comes out clean (about 35 minutes).
14. Cool the logs for about 20 minutes on the cookie sheet.
15. Reduce oven temperature to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
16. Transfer logs to the work surface. Discard parchment paper.
17. Cut each log diagonally into slices that are 1/2 inch thick.
18. Arrange cookies with flat sides down on unlined cookie sheets.
19. Bake until crisp and golden brown (about 15 minutes).
20. Transfer cookies to racks and cool completely.
(Note: This recipe can be prepared up to two weeks in advance. Store at room temperature in an airtight container.)
